name: kalyvask
description: Personal Claude Code plugins from kalyvask.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Personal chief-of-staff agent over a JSONL work queue, tier-based permission engine, conformance audits, typed-link graph, weekly digest, event-driven hooks, and inbound channels for forwarded email + Slack threads. Reads context/ and memory/ before responding; drafts emails to your own inbox; routes decisions into per-project state.
